creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sun Aug 26 02:54:49 2012
New Revision: 303175
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303175

Log:
  - Update to 5.0
  - Add LICENSE
  
  Changelog:
    * Modularize
  
  PR:		ports/171050
  Submitted by:	dteske (maintainer)
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile
  head/sysutils/sysrc/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile	Sun Aug 26 02:47:48 2012	(r303174)
+++ head/sysutils/sysrc/Makefile	Sun Aug 26 02:54:49 2012	(r303175)
@@ -1,25 +1,40 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	sysrc
 # Date created:				28 December 2011
-# Whom:					Devin Teske <dteske@vicor.com>
+# Whom:					Devin Teske <dteske@FreeBSD.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD$
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sysrc
-PORTVERSION=	4.1
+PORTVERSION=	5.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://druidbsd.sourceforge.net/download/
 
 MAINTAINER=	dteske@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Utility to get or set rc.conf(5) values
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-PLIST_FILES=	sbin/${PORTNAME}
 MAN8=		${PORTNAME}.8
 
+PLIST_FILES=	sbin/${PORTNAME}                   \
+		share/${PORTNAME}/common.subr      \
+		share/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}.subr \
+		libexec/${PORTNAME}/include/messages.subr
+
+PLIST_DIRS=	share/${PORTNAME}           \
+		libexec/${PORTNAME}/include \
+		libexec/${PORTNAME}
+
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/common.subr ${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}/
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.subr ${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}/
+	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/libexec/${PORTNAME}/include
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/messages.subr ${PREFIX}/libexec/${PORTNAME}/include/
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN8} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man8/
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/sysrc/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/sysrc/distinfo	Sun Aug 26 02:47:48 2012	(r303174)
+++ head/sysutils/sysrc/distinfo	Sun Aug 26 02:54:49 2012	(r303175)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (sysrc-4.1.tar.gz) = e667dcde0466eb21ea9feb5a6a0c1e27150c1c5ef3831cd6f902f762af675b12
-SIZE (sysrc-4.1.tar.gz) = 12661
+SHA256 (sysrc-5.0.tar.gz) = 3b4704dc54388fd38729b76e401c2efe2e429a33a777888b88b857c493352585
+SIZE (sysrc-5.0.tar.gz) = 12516
